meaning: adj.象牛肉的,健壮的,结实的
examples: The baby's father is Pasha, a very beefy and bull-headed man.
But when cloning works, as it increasingly does, it can replicate star beefy bovine and plump pigs.
Beefy security guards funnelled the pupils through a gauntlet of media and several dozen silent supporters.
Inside, I found a beefy, watchful, fair-haired man, who said his name was Armando.
Then again, beefy hardware may not be what sells the next generation of consoles.
